p0_mbbs.topic: A Rare Case of Lemierre's Syndrome Complicating Pharyngitis in a Young Adult
p0_mbbs.description: An unusual presentation of Lemierre's syndrome with internal jugular vein thrombosis and septic pulmonary emboli following an uncomplicated sore throat. Novel management approach with prolonged antibiotics and anticoagulation.

p1_mdms.topic: Efficacy of SGLT2 Inhibitors versus DPP-4 Inhibitors in Type 2 Diabetes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
p1_mdms.pico: Population: Adults with Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus; Intervention: SGLT2 inhibitors; Comparison: DPP-4 inhibitors; Outcome: HbA1c reduction, cardiovascular events, hospitalization for heart failure

p2_dmmch.topic: Prospective Cohort Study: Association of Serum Procalcitonin Levels with Disease Severity and Mortality in Community-Acquired Pneumonia
p2_dmmch.methods: Prospective observational cohort, ROC analysis, multivariate regression

p3_faculty.topic: Network Meta-Analysis: Comparative Effectiveness of Pharmacological Interventions for Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction
p3_faculty.interventions: ACE inhibitors, ARBs, ARNI, beta-blockers, MRAs, SGLT2 inhibitors, ivabradine, digoxin
